test_sufficiency_summary: `cd tests/gui && make -j2 && xvfb-run -a ./GuiTests` passed with OK (25 tests), but StrategicGuiLiveTest does not inspect all static-box-contained BattleResultsGUI controls and missed remaining `this`-parented labels.
documentation_accuracy_summary: Documenter artifacts exist and reference commit e138991bf86d70a05e8139b836f1623e2a0f0b33, but AGENTS.md and WXWIDGETS_UPGRADE_CHANGES.md overstate Subtask 3 completion because BattleResultsGUI still retains scoped static-box parenting defects.
